title: desmodium infractum
intro: Desmodium infractum, also known as stick-tight or tick clover, is a perennial legume native to tropical Africa and Asia, recognized by its distinctive vining habit and small, pink to purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Desmodium infractum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in wound healing, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as diabetes and hypertension. Desmodium infractum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a poultice or ointment, depending on the specific health condition being addressed.
